mapper.select: SELECT promotion_id AS promotionId, title AS title, content AS content, image_url AS imageUrl, DATE_FORMAT(start_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS startDate, DATE_FORMAT(end_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS endDate FROM promotions WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND CURDATE() BETWEEN start_date AND end_date ORDER BY promotion_id DESC

SELECT promotion_id AS promotionId, title AS title, content AS content, image_url AS imageUrl, DATE_FORMAT(start_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS startDate, DATE_FORMAT(end_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS endDate FROM promotions WHERE promotion_id = #{promotionId} AND use_yn = 'Y'
